title: oxybaphus prostratus
intro: Oxybaphus prostratus, also known as the spreading four o'clock, is a plant species belonging to the family Nyctaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oxybaphus prostratus include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion and relieve stress.
